psi._reason: Google PageSpeed Insights API returned HTTP 429 RESOURCE_EXHAUSTED for all 3 calls. The anonymous/default per-day quota for the consumer project (583797351490) is 0. No Core Web Vitals or category scores could be captured this run. Saved error payloads to tools/psi_homepage.json, tools/psi_listings.json, tools/psi_detail.json. Re-run after providing a PSI API key (env PSI_API_KEY) appended as &key=... — that gives 25k queries/day for free.
psi.fallback_recommendation: Open https://pagespeed.web.dev/analysis?url=https://casa-mult-visata.netlify.app/ in browser to capture scores manually, OR set GOOGLE_PSI_API_KEY and re-run.

gaps.img_dimensions_audit: No in src/ pages or layout has width/height attributes (only inline SVG icons do). High-traffic images missing dimensions: /images/hero.webp (home hero), /images/agent.webp (multiple pages), property featuredImage in card grid (proprietati.astro:305, index.astro:161), detail hero (slug.astro:237), gallery thumbs (slug.astro:260), similar cards (slug.astro:403). Net effect: layout-shift risk + CLS penalty on every page.
gaps.form_input_attrs: contact.astro: autocomplete set on name/tel/email (good). MISSING on all inputs: inputmode (tel should be inputmode='tel', email should be inputmode='email'), enterkeyhint, and no inputmode='numeric' for phone. proprietati/[slug].astro inquiry form: autocomplete present on nume/tel/email, same missing inputmode/enterkeyhint. No spellcheck hints. No type='search' on any listing filters checked.
gaps.lazy_loading: loading='lazy' applied on listing cards, gallery thumbs, similar cards, favorites cards, iframes (map, tour, video) — good. MISSING: decoding='async' on every in repo (0 occurrences). MISSING: fetchpriority='high' on the LCP hero image (slug.astro:237 and homepage hero). Hero image has neither loading nor fetchpriority — browser default eager is OK but no priority hint.
gaps.reduced_motion: Two @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) blocks present in style.css (lines 248, 432). Layout.astro JS reveal observer also short-circuits when reduce-motion matches (line 229). Coverage is decent but partial — transitions on .share-btn, .fav-toggle, .view-toggle-btn, .active-chip etc. are not gated.
gaps.passive_listeners: 58 addEventListener calls across 5 page files. None pass {passive:true}. Touch/scroll listeners (zoom/swipe in slug.astro lightbox, scroll-based code) are likely non-passive, which can block scroll on mobile. Needs targeted audit of touchstart/touchmove/wheel handlers in [slug].astro and proprietati.astro.

good: JSON-LD structured data (RealEstateAgent + LocalBusiness + Organization + WebSite)
Mobile media queries at 540/600/640/700/740/900 px breakpoints — reasonable coverage
Sticky-ish floating WhatsApp CTA (.whatsapp-float) already exists
Netlify honeypot anti-spam on both forms
Custom RO validation messages on contact form
concerns: External Google Fonts stylesheet is render-blocking (no media-print swap trick, no preload+onload)
Mobile hamburger uses inline onclick — fine but harder to a11y-audit; no focus trap when open
.whatsapp-float exists but no symmetric phone-call CTA on mobile (one-thumb reach)
Embedded Google Maps iframe on /contact (heavy ~600KB) — already lazy, but could be facade-loaded
Inline backslash bug at proprietati/[slug].astro:387 — '\images\apartament.webp' uses backslashes, will 404 on Linux/Netlify
favicon.svg only — no PNG fallback, no apple-touch-icon (180x180), no maskable icon

prioritized_actions.impact: Eliminates CLS on every page; directly improves PSI performance + CWV. Likely single biggest mobile win.
Faster LCP on home + detail pages. Add in Layout (page-scoped via slot prop) and fetchpriority='high' decoding='async' on the hero .
Frees main thread during image decode — better INP/TBT on listings page with many cards.
Mobile keyboards show numeric for phone, email layout for email, 'send' enter key — measurable lead-form completion uplift.
PWA installability, iOS home-screen icon, proper Android theme. Add public/site.webmanifest + 180x180 apple-touch-icon.png + 192/512 icons + maskable.
Always-visible Call + WhatsApp bar on mobile (the floating WA exists but a phone-call CTA is missing). Big conversion lever for a real-estate lead site.

Edge-to-edge layout on iPhone notch/Dynamic Island; sticky CTA respects home-indicator. Change viewport meta to 'width=device-width, initial-scale=1, viewport-fit=cover' and add env(safe-area-inset-bottom) padding to footer + sticky CTA.
Removes render-blocking Google Fonts request from critical path; improves FCP/LCP. Use rel='preload' as='style' + onload swap, or self-host woff2.
Smoother scrolling on the detail-page lightbox/swipe; better INP. Audit touchstart/touchmove/wheel in [slug].astro and pass {passive:true} where preventDefault isn't needed.
Wrap remaining transitions (.share-btn, .fav-toggle, .view-toggle-btn, .active-chip, .map-popup-link, fav-clear-btn) in prefers-reduced-motion gate.
Line 387 of [slug].astro has '\images\apartament.webp' — backslashes will 404. Pure bug, easy fix.
Replace contact-page Google Maps iframe with a static thumbnail + click-to-load — saves ~600KB on /contact mobile.
When hamburger menu is open, trap focus and close on Esc — a11y polish.
Verify all interactive elements >= 44x44 px on mobile (share-btn, view-toggle-btn, active-chip-x look borderline).

out_of_scope: Migrating to Astro <Image /> component (would require refactor of all img tags + content-collection schema changes)
Self-hosting Google Fonts (touched only at meta level — full migration is a separate effort)
Adding a real PSI CI workflow with API key + threshold gates
Replacing Netlify Forms with a custom backend
Internationalization (ro-RO only is fine for now)
